chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 286 & 287 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal 29.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Abbas, advocate for the applicant Per office note these are time-barred references. Be that as it may these matters are pending since 2024 for orders as to non-prosecution. No effort has been made by the applicant’s counsel either the office objection addressed or matters fixed before the court. Even today time is being sought for no cogent reason whatsoever. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these references are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
